name: RPlog_Fixing_a_Hole
title: A Pirate Without a Ship
summary: At the bustling Ord Mantell spaceport, the eccentric Quarren captain Salty Jack and his Mon Calamari first mate Barnacle Bill disembark a shuttle in full pirate bluster, lamenting the loss of their ship, their parrot Polly, and their identification to a space monster. The doctor Lynae and her companion Shael, accompanied by the Imperial marine Holden, watch with a mix of clinical fascination and wary bemusement as the pair blunder into them, Jack nearly toppling a young woman with his bad wooden leg. Lynae, ever the scientist, offers theories on regrowing Jack's tentacle and replacing Bill's missing eye, while Shael openly wonders whether the two are mad. Holden repeatedly and stonily demands their identification and directs them to the security station for verification. After much theatrical grief over their lost life at sea, Jack and Bill resign themselves to the customs building, trudging off in search of a tavern and a stiff drink.
